title: refund — published macros
description: No published macros. The refund module operates purely through service classes (RefundOrchestrator / RefundApprovalManager / RefundProviderExecutor / ProrationCalculator / ClawbackCoordinator) invoked from HTTP controllers + CLI commands + event listeners. There is no per-request refund context that would justify a Request macro — a refund is initiated at explicit call sites, not implicitly from the request.
namespace_note: No macros; documented for symmetry with the module family.
rationale: Referrals ships Request::activeReferralProgram / Request::inboundReferral macros because there IS a request-boundary concept — the referral cookie carries context across requests. Refunds have no equivalent — the refund is initiated at the /refunds POST call site, not carried across requests.

The customer-facing refund UI passes payment_id explicitly via the request body — the endpoint controller resolves it via PaymentRepository::findByCustomer($tenantId, $paymentId, $customerId) and does not need a Request macro.
The admin-facing refund CLI + admin UI pass every parameter explicitly. No implicit context needed.
